title: Vejalpur Heat Wave
lead: Vejalpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.34. This critical event has reached a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vejalpur has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 14.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 43%, and the wind speed is 12.0 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating a persistent warm spell.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
